title: cyperus refractus var. lancastriensis
intro: Cyperus refractus var. lancastriensis, also known as the Umbrella Sedge, is a type of plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to southern Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of various health issues. The health benefits of Cyperus refractus var. lancastriensis include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of a decoction or infusion, and it can also be made into a paste or applied topically to affected areas.
